luxury.title: Luxury Fleet
luxury.description: Private boats maintained to the highest standards with full amenities for your comfort.

hidden.title: Hidden Gems
hidden.description: Navigate through narrow canals where large boats can't reach. Experience authentic local life.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Trips
bespoke.description: Tailor your journey's time and route to perfectly match your personal preferences.

Footer.title: Contact Our Concierge
Footer.description: Choose your preferred platform to start your journey with us. We are available daily to assist your reservation.

scenic-canal-1hr.title: 1-Hour Scenic Canal Tour
scenic-canal-1hr.highlights: Sightseeing, Wat Paknam (Big Buddha) Photo Spot, Khlong Bang Luang Artist House
scenic-canal-1hr.description: A perfect introduction to the charms of Phasi Charoen canal. Cruise past local wooden houses and stop for a breathtaking photo with the Great Golden Buddha.
itinerary: Scenic canal cruise through local communities
Wat Paknam Phasi Charoen (Big Buddha Photo Spot)
Pass by Khlong Bang Luang Artist House
Experience the authentic riverside atmosphere

heritage-art-2hr.title: 2-Hour Heritage & Art Tour
heritage-art-2hr.highlights: Wat Paknam (20 mins stop), Khlong Bang Luang Artist House (40 mins stop)
heritage-art-2hr.description: A deep dive into canal culture. Includes dedicated stops at the Big Buddha and the historic Artist House market for art and coffee lovers.
itinerary: Traditional canal cruise along Khlong Bang Luang
20-minute stop at Wat Paknam (Great Buddha)
40-minute stop at Artist House (Baan Silapin)
Fish feeding ritual at Wat Pradu Chimphli
Sightseeing of centuries-old teak wood houses

temple-cafe-2hr.title: 2-Hour Temple & Cafe Tour
temple-cafe-2hr.description: Start from the mouth of the canal at Wat Kalayanamit, visit the Great Buddha, and end your trip at a 100-year-old lychee orchard cafe.
itinerary: Board at Wat Kalayanamit (Luang Pho To)
30-minute stop at Wat Paknam Phasi Charoen
30-minute stop at Wat Ratchaorasaram (Thai-Chinese Art)
Final drop off at Poomjai Garden (Hidden canal-side cafe)

custom-merit-6hr.title: 6-Hour Private Charter (Full Day)
custom-merit-6hr.description: Design your own spiritual journey. Perfect for families (8-10 persons). Visit 3, 5, or 9 sacred temples along the historic Phasi Charoen and Bangkok Yai canals.
itinerary: Customizable route based on your preference
Choice of 12+ historic temples (e.g., Wat Hong, Wat Nak Prok)
Leisurely canal-side lunch break (Self-paid)
Expert boat captain with local heritage knowledge

mu-spirit-tour.title: The 'Sai Mu' Spiritual Tour
mu-spirit-tour.description: A specialized tour for those seeking blessings. Visit the most powerful spiritual spots including the Rahu statue and the 300-year-old Naga temple.
itinerary: Wat Nak Prok (Crawling under the 300-year-old temple)
Wat Khun Chan (Praying to Giant Rahu)
Wat Paknam (Meditation at the Great Buddha)
Wat Nang Chi (Heritage temple from King Rama I era)

classic-small.name: Classic Small Boat
classic-small.description: A charming open-air wooden boat perfect for sightseeing. Experience the natural breeze, ideal for couples or intimate groups of friends.

vintage-taxi.name: Vintage Taxi Boat
vintage-taxi.description: A classic heritage design with a protective roof and comfortable seating. Perfectly suited for medium-sized families seeking a nostalgic journey.

grand-longtail.name: Grand Longtail Boat
grand-longtail.description: Our spacious signature longtail boat with ample moving space. The premier choice for large family excursions or organized tour groups.

express-canal.name: Express Canal Boat
express-canal.description: An extra-large vessel designed for high capacity and maximum comfort. Features excellent ventilation, perfect for large corporate events or big gatherings.

eco-electric.name: Eco Electric Boat
eco-electric.description: A modern, silent, and eco-friendly electric vessel. Ideal for a peaceful and sustainable river experience without engine noise or emissions.

Destinations.title: Destinations
Destinations.intro: Explore the hidden gems and iconic landmarks along the Bangkok canals and Chao Phraya river.

TourDetail.inclusive: Inclusive of all taxes and fees
TourDetail.notFoundDesc: The destination you are looking for does not exist.
